_comment: Per-machine config. Copy to launcher.local.json (gitignored) and adjust. The launcher also creates launcher.local.json on first run, and you can edit it from the Settings panel in the UI.

vars._comment: Tool paths referenced as ${NAME} in services.json. Use 'mvn' if Maven is on your PATH.

paths._comment: Optional per-service folder overrides (absolute paths). Anything here wins over the ${ROOT}-based cwd in services.json. The Settings folder browser writes here.
